what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record that links a channel-memory entry to an image asset in the design-source channel by referencing a URI-like target and recording an added timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no markdown body
It declares an attachment of type images
It belongs to the design-source channel
It has a precise ISO-8601 added timestamp
standouts: The target uses a channel-scoped image:// URI rather than a filesystem path
The record is purely metadata: no image data, caption, or alt text is present
The added timestamp is recorded to microsecond precision
concerns: The image:// URI scheme and resolution mechanism are not defined in this file
There is no caption, alt text, or title for accessibility/context
There is no added_by or provenance field
No MIME type, dimensions, or file size are recorded
notes: A minimal, timestamped metadata pointer that attaches a design-source pitch-deck image to channel memory via a URI target.
questions: What does p-09 represent within the pitch-deck sequence?
How is the image:// URI resolved to an actual file or storage object?
Who added this attachment and why?
What is the image format, size, or version?
purpose_vs_actual: The declared attachment_type and target align with the file's apparent purpose as an image pointer, but the file itself stores only reference metadata, not the image or descriptive context.
apparent_themes: Reference-by-URI instead of embedding binary assets
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a specific pitch-deck image in the design-source channel is attached to channel memory, enabling later retrieval or contextual citation without duplicating the image.
novelty: It uses a channel-qualified image:// URI for an attachment target rather than a conventional relative or absolute filesystem path.
contribution: A precise, timestamped attachment record that maps a channel memory entry to a design-source image asset by URI, supporting asset traceability while keeping binary content external.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record with id att-1a7d6ab7 in the design-source channel that points to the image target image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-09 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to catalog and link a pitch-deck image asset into the design-source channel memory for later reference.
